Soil/Rock Description: Brownish yellow (10YR 6/6), slightly clayey sandy SILT with some angular to subangular fine to medium gravel. (FILL)
Light yellowish brown (10YR 6/4), angular to subangular, coarse GRAVEL of rock fragments. (FILL)
Weak, brownish yellow (10YR 6/8) deeply weathered, highly decomposed, coarse ash TUFF. Angular to subangular, fine to medium GRAVEL of highly decomposed tuff fragments
Weak, brownish yellow (10YR 6/8) dark grey, highly decomposed, TUFF BRECCIA. (Angular, slightly subangular, fine to coarse GRAVEL of highly decomposed tuff breccia fragments)

Extremely weak to very weak, light yellowish brown (10YR 6/4), completely decomposed to moderately decomposed, coarse ash TUFF. (Slightly clayey fine to coarse SAND with much angular fine to medium gravel)
Moderately weak to moderately strong, light brownish grey, moderately decomposed, coarse ash TUFF (COMPTONITE).
No recovery, assumed to be completely decomposed TUFF.

Weak to moderately weak, grey (10YR 7/1), mottled light brownish grey, highly decomposed, TUFF BRECCIA. (Angular, fine to coarse GRAVEL and occasional cobble of highly decomposed tuff breccia fragments).
No recovery, assumed to be completely decomposed TUFF BRECCIA.
Weak to moderately weak, light yellowish brown (10YR 6/4), highly decomposed, TUFF BRECCIA. (Angular, slightly silty fine to coarse GRAVEL of highly decomposed tuff breccia fragments).

Moderately weak to moderately strong, light greyish brown, moderately decomposed, FINE-GRAINITE. Joints are very closely to closely spaced, rough, planar, with clay coating, 0.5-1.0mm thick, with oxide stained, dipping at 15° to 25°, 25° to 35° and 80° to 85°.
